title: Nine Blades
description: Add Nine Blades, inspired by a certain novel《I studied slashing in a mental hospital》, I pay tribute here
body:
Add Nine Blades(NOT NINE SWORD), inspired by a certain novel
1.[Knife Of Doom]: Inflicts level 3 withering on the target for 300 ticks, level 3 doom for 1200 ticks, and level 3 darkness for 500 ticks
2.[Burial Mountain]: Deals damage equal to 33% of the target's Max Health and 10% of the caster's Max Health, not applicable if the caster's Health is no longer able to withstand Recoil (this effect can be ignored in the Liberation Form)
3.[Chizuru]: Swing your weapon and fire 8 Spirited Arrows
4.[Rain Avalanche]: Turn the world's weather into a thunderstorm and rain down a lot of lightning
5.[Black Rope]: Fires 255 bolts of lightning at the target location
6.[Misty Pupils]: Inflicts 600 minutes of nausea and 400 minutes of Level 1 poison to the target
7.[Takehime]: Deals an additional large amount of but not lethal damage to the target
8.[Flame Sparrow]: Sets the target on fire for 15 seconds and generates lava underneath its feet
9.[Hidden]: Right-click to activate the skill, giving you 1200 ticks of invisibility and 1000 ticks of resistance up IV
10.[Chop White]: Attack range 100 tiles
11. [Woe To God]: Can attack creative mode. Has an additional effect on entities with more than 200 HP and a resistance increase of V or more, dealing true damage with each attack (the higher the number of attacks, the higher the true damage)
Write to the Chinese(写给中国人)：
本模组中文名为[祸津九刀]，而非[九把刀]
如果你想赞助或查看各版本的详细区别，请打开下方链接
https://afdian.com/a/newmyshuaibi
